HGSS.442.0000:
Daisy: Hi! My kid brother is the Gym
Leader in Viridian City.\f
But he goes out of town so often,
it causes problems for the Trainers.
HGSS.442.0001:
Daisy: Hi! Good timing. I’m about
to have some tea.\f
Would you like to join me?\f
Oh, you seem to keep your Pokémon
a bit on the dirty side.\f
Grooming helps them become more
beautiful and friendly.\f
Would you like me to groom one? [0200,0000]
HGSS.442.0002: Daisy: Which one should I groom?\f
HGSS.442.0004:
Daisy: There you go!
All done.\f
See? Doesn’t it look nice?
It’s such a cute Pokémon.
HGSS.442.0005:
Daisy: I always have tea around
this time. Come join me.
HGSS.442.0006:
Daisy: You don’t want to have one
groomed? OK, we’ll just have tea.
HGSS.442.0007:
Daisy: Oh, sorry. I honestly can’t
groom an Egg.
HGSS.442.0008:
Daisy: You are really into grooming!
Say!\r
Would you like my kid brother’s number?\f
He is the Gym Leader at Viridian City.
Have you challenged him?\f
Do you want to register him? [0200,0000]
HGSS.442.0010:
Daisy: Give him a call when you feel
like it.\f
He can be overly confident, but he
still needs company.\f
He said he won’t have any plans on
Sunday nights...\r
Giggle!
HGSS.442.0011:
Daisy: Really? You won’t?
I see...\r
How disappointing.
HGSS.442.0012:
Daisy: Do you want to register
my kid brother’s number? [0200,0000]
